plugins.name: commit-craft
plugins.description: Write clear, conventional git commit messages from your staged changes.

plugins.name: design-forge
plugins.description: ObjectCore meta-plugin: author, theme, and consume a stack-agnostic design system from a DTCG design-token source of truth — generate accessible token scales, theme them with a resolver, and keep UI on-brand by picking semantic tokens by role.

plugins.name: forge-improver
plugins.description: F7 self-improvement: a forge-improver subagent that proposes behavior-preserving refinements to ObjectCore's forge scaffolder code, gated by the eval-driven admission pipeline (boundary + golden + guard + full check) before any human merges.

plugins.name: hello-objectcore
plugins.description: Minimal demo plugin proving the ObjectCore derive + validate pipeline end to end.

plugins.name: kb-writer
plugins.description: Surface the project knowledge base at session start and prompt capturing durable lessons at session end — the KB's automated read/write surface.

plugins.name: knowledge-base
plugins.description: Capture and curate durable lessons, patterns, gotchas, and decisions in ObjectCore's factory knowledge base.

plugins.name: marketplace-builder
plugins.description: ObjectCore meta-plugin: governs the catalog build — derive marketplace.json from the plugin graph through the single deriveCatalog seam, validate, and keep it in sync.

plugins.name: meta-generator
plugins.description: ObjectCore meta-plugin: generates new meta-plugins (generators and governance plugins) from an archetype — the factory replicating itself.

plugins.name: plugin-forge
plugins.description: ObjectCore meta-plugin: generates new plugins and their catalog entries via the spec-driven /forge pipeline — grill the idea, plan the PluginSpec, scaffold deterministically, then pass the validation + activation gate.

plugins.name: plugin-validator
plugins.description: ObjectCore meta-plugin: governs plugin and marketplace correctness — the hard-rule checklist plus the validate + eval gate.

plugins.name: pr-craft
plugins.description: Generate a clear pull-request title and description from the commits on a branch, ready to open or update the PR.

plugins.name: reflection
plugins.description: The reflection loop: a PostToolUse hook that auto-invokes a self-reflection subagent on a red ObjectCore gate, diagnosing the failure and capturing durable lessons into the knowledge base.

plugins.name: release-manager
plugins.description: ObjectCore meta-plugin: governs plugin releases — the Changesets-driven version, {plugin}--v{semver} tagging, SHA-pinned catalog publishing, and build-provenance/attestation flow.
